languages.text: "Вот-вот. Если она, к примеру, считала, что может контролировать культистов..." {n}— Идира пожимает плечами.{/n} "Знаешь, что важно, старик? Что мы, возможно, рядом с теми, кто ее использовал и предал. А если так — я хочу до них поскорее добраться!"

traits.locale_text: "Вот-вот. Если она, к примеру, считала, что может контролировать культистов..." {n}— Идира пожимает плечами.{/n} "Знаешь, что важно, старик? Что мы, возможно, рядом с теми, кто ее использовал и предал. А если так — я хочу до них поскорее добраться!"
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: "That's it. What if, say, she thought she could control the cultists..." {n}Idira shrugs.{/n} "You're missing the point, old man. We could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if that's so, I want to get to them now!"
languages.original_text: "Вот-вот. Если она, к примеру, считала, что может контролировать культистов..." {n}— Идира пожимает плечами.{/n} "Знаешь, что важно, старик? Что мы, возможно, рядом с теми, кто ее использовал и предал. А если так — я хочу до них поскорее добраться!"

traits.locale_text: "That's it. If she, for example, thought she could control the cultists..." {n}— Idira shrugs.{/n} "You know what is important, old man? That we could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if it is so, I want to get to them right now!"
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

traits.locale_text: "That's it. If she, for example, thought she could control the cultists..." {n}— Idira shrugs.{/n} "You know what is important, old man? That we could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if it is so, I want to get to them right now!"
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

traits.locale_text: "That's it. What if, say, she thought she could control the cultists..." {n}Idira shrugs.{/n} "You're missing the point, old man. We could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if that's so, I want to get to them now!"
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

traits.locale_text: "That's it. What if, say, she thought she could control the cultists..." {n}Idira shrugs.{/n} "You're missing the point, old man. We could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if that's so, I want to get to them now!"
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

traits.locale_text: "That's it. What if, say, she thought she could control the cultists..." {n}Idira shrugs.{/n} "You're missing the point, old man. We could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if that's so, I want to get to them now!"
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: "Das ist es. Was wäre, wenn sie glaubte, die Kultisten kontrollieren zu können ..." {n}Idira zuckt mit den Schultern.{/n} "Du verstehst nicht, was ich meine, alter Mann. Wir könnten nicht weit von denen entfernt stehen, die sie benutzt und verraten haben. Und wenn das so ist, dann will ich sie jetzt erwischen!"
languages.original_text: "That's it. What if, say, she thought she could control the cultists..." {n}Idira shrugs.{/n} "You're missing the point, old man. We could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if that's so, I want to get to them now!"

traits.locale_text: "Das ist es. Was wäre, wenn sie glaubte, die Kultisten kontrollieren zu können ..." {n}Idira zuckt mit den Schultern.{/n} "Du verstehst nicht, was ich meine, alter Mann. Wir könnten nicht weit von denen entfernt stehen, die sie benutzt und verraten haben. Und wenn das so ist, dann will ich sie jetzt erwischen!"

languages.text: "C'est ça. Et si, disons, elle pensait pouvoir contrôler les cultistes..." {n}Idira hausse les épaules.{/n} "Vous ne comprenez pas, mon vieux. Nous pourrions nous trouver non loin de ceux qui l'ont utilisée et trahie. Et si c'est le cas, je veux les atteindre maintenant !"
languages.original_text: "That's it. What if, say, she thought she could control the cultists..." {n}Idira shrugs.{/n} "You're missing the point, old man. We could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if that's so, I want to get to them now!"

traits.locale_text: "C'est ça. Et si, disons, elle pensait pouvoir contrôler les cultistes..." {n}Idira hausse les épaules.{/n} "Vous ne comprenez pas, mon vieux. Nous pourrions nous trouver non loin de ceux qui l'ont utilisée et trahie. Et si c'est le cas, je veux les atteindre maintenant !"

languages.text: "Eso es. Y si, digamos, ella pensara que puede controlar a los cultistas..." {n}Idira se encoge de hombros.{/n} "No estás entendiendo, viejo. Podríamos estar no muy lejos de los que la usaron y traicionaron. Y si es así, ¡quiero llegar a ellos ahora!"
languages.original_text: "That's it. What if, say, she thought she could control the cultists..." {n}Idira shrugs.{/n} "You're missing the point, old man. We could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if that's so, I want to get to them now!"

traits.locale_text: "Eso es. Y si, digamos, ella pensara que puede controlar a los cultistas..." {n}Idira se encoge de hombros.{/n} "No estás entendiendo, viejo. Podríamos estar no muy lejos de los que la usaron y traicionaron. Y si es así, ¡quiero llegar a ellos ahora!"

languages.text: "İşte bu kadar. Ya diyelim ki tarikatçıları kontrol edebileceğini düşündüyse..." {n}Idira omuz silkiyor.{/n} "Asıl noktayı kaçırıyorsun, ihtiyar. Onu kullanan ve ona ihanet edenlerden çok uzakta olmayabiliriz. Ve eğer öyleyse, onlara hemen ulaşmak istiyorum!"
languages.original_text: "That's it. What if, say, she thought she could control the cultists..." {n}Idira shrugs.{/n} "You're missing the point, old man. We could be standing not far from the ones who used and betrayed her. And if that's so, I want to get to them now!"

traits.locale_text: "İşte bu kadar. Ya diyelim ki tarikatçıları kontrol edebileceğini düşündüyse..." {n}Idira omuz silkiyor.{/n} "Asıl noktayı kaçırıyorsun, ihtiyar. Onu kullanan ve ona ihanet edenlerden çok uzakta olmayabiliriz. Ve eğer öyleyse, onlara hemen ulaşmak istiyorum!"
